channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: ‘We can insure the ship, but we cannot insure a human life.’
item.description: International Maritime Organization chief Arsenio Dominguez warns of 20,000 seafarers stranded in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Houthis open new front against Israel, is Red Sea shipping at risk?
item.description: The Houthis in Yemen have launched their first attacks on Israel, opening a new front in the month-long regional war.

item.title: Iran hits industrial zone in southern Israel
item.description: An Iranian missile barrage has caused a fire a chemical plant near Beersheba in southern Israel.

item.title: Israeli police block Catholic cardinal from Holy Sepulchre on Palm Sunday
item.description: Since the US and Israel launched a war on Iran, Israel has closed holy sites in Jerusalem, citing safety concerns.

item.title: Funeral held for Lebanese journalists killed in Israeli strike
item.description: Hundreds gathered in Beirut’s southern suburbs for the funeral of three Lebanese journalists killed by Israel.

item.title: Houthis open new front in Iran war: Will Yemeni group block Bab al-Mandeb?
item.description: Blockade of strait, one of the world's busiest maritime routes, would prove disastrous for global economy.

item.title: How the US memeifies its war on Iran
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Linh Nguyen explains the new era of war propaganda.

item.title: Pakistan maintains ‘delicate balancing act’ as it hosts Iran talks
item.description: Foreign ministers meet in Islamabad, seeking to de-escalate the US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: ‘Nowhere is really safe’: Iranian dissidents grapple with US war in Iran
item.description: Critics of Iran's government say they fear retribution while in exile, as well as growing anti-immigrant sentiment.

item.title: Iran ‘hits’ US AWACS, air tankers: What else has it targeted in past month?
item.description: Iran reportedly hits E-3 Sentry flying radars, which track drones, missiles, aircraft from hundreds of kilometres away.
